title: Sufi Culture and Literature Master's Degree with/without Thesis Publications and Dissertations
content:
Sufi Culture and Literature Master's Degree with/without Thesis Publications and Dissertations

Opened in 2016, the theses completed within the scope of the Sufi Culture and Literature Program are as follows:
